tips.lighting: Use consistent, good lighting for more reliable results.
tips.distance: Keep the same distance from the camera each time.
tips.angles: Stick to the same angles in every shoot for more accurate comparison.
tips.cameraHeight: Keep the camera roughly at mid-body height.
tips.timer: Use a timer to steady your pose and reduce shake.
tips.clothes: Wear similar clothing to assess changes more clearly.
tips.background: Choose a simple, consistent background as much as possible.
tips.frequency: Take photos regularly (for example weekly or every two weeks) depending on your goal.

tips.bmr: Basal Metabolic Rate: the energy your body burns at rest.
tips.tdee: Total Daily Energy Expenditure = BMR × activity factor.
tips.target: Daily calories after applying your goal (bulk/cut/maintenance).

notes.tdeeAvg: TDEE = average of BMR formulas × activity (or an approved formula).
notes.goalsRange: Goals adjust calories from −40% to +40% depending on the goal.
notes.macrosBalance: Macro ratios are automatically balanced to total 100%.
notes.mealTip: Compare your meal with the goal and adjust quantities to reach the target.
notes.activityHint: Choose the activity level based on your daily work pattern, not only workouts.

hero.title: One platform to manage clients and plans
hero.description: Organize the entire client journey inside one system that brings together client management, training and nutrition plans, weekly reports, and conversations between admins, coaches, and clients in a clear and professional experience.

themeShowcase.title: Choose your platform theme
themeShowcase.description: Customize the system appearance to match your brand, with live previews of the core interface elements.
themeShowcase.hint: Choose a theme and preview the change instantly.

preview.heading: Live preview
preview.title: Component showcase
preview.subheading: See how the theme affects system components
preview.buttonDesc: Preview primary and secondary action buttons.
preview.cardDesc: A sample of cards used to display data and plans.
preview.badgeDesc: Preview badges used for statuses and important elements.

howItWorks.title: A simple and clear workflow
howItWorks.description: Start with client data, prepare plans, then track progress inside one platform.

steps.title: Collect data
steps.description: Start by gathering the client’s core information through forms and questionnaires.

steps.title: Prepare plans
steps.description: After reviewing the data, create the account and prepare workout and nutrition plans.

steps.title: Track progress
steps.description: Clients track their progress while coaches and admins review reports, measurements, and chats.

roles.title: A tailored experience for every user
roles.description: The system provides different tools based on permissions, so each user gets what fits their role.

workouts.title: My workouts
workouts.description: View workout plans by day and log performance, weights, and reps.

nutrition.title: Nutrition plan
nutrition.description: Track daily meals, supplements, and alternatives with calorie and nutrition details.

exercises.title: Exercise guides
exercises.description: View images or videos that help clients perform exercises correctly.

progress.title: Progress tracking
progress.description: Track development, commitment, and results through clear indicators inside the system.

reports.title: Weekly report
reports.description: Send measurements, progress photos, and notes to the coach in an organized way.

chat.title: Chats
chat.description: Communicate directly with the coach or admin and send messages and files in one place.

reminders.title: Reminders
reminders.description: Organize daily reminders and recurring personal alerts easily.

recipes.title: Recipes
recipes.description: Browse recipes with nutrition values and preparation details that support plan adherence.

cta.title: A daily interface that helps clients stay consistent
cta.description: Everything the client needs from workouts, nutrition, reports, and chats in one clear experience.

clients.title: Client management
clients.description: Track client profiles, status, progress, and access each client’s journey details.

workoutPlans.title: Workout plans
workoutPlans.description: Create, edit, customize, and assign workout plans to clients with ease.

nutritionPlans.title: Nutrition plans
nutritionPlans.description: Build nutrition plans and organize meals, alternatives, and supplements based on client goals.

reports.title: Report reviews
reports.description: Review weekly reports, add coach notes, and monitor commitment and progress.

exerciseLibrary.title: Exercise library
exerciseLibrary.description: Access an organized exercise library to use inside training programs.

chat.title: Client communication
chat.description: Manage daily conversations with clients to speed up follow-up and answer questions.

forms.title: Forms
forms.description: Use form data and client responses to better understand each case before building the program.

sharedTools.title: Shared tools
sharedTools.description: Access shared tools available by permissions such as the calculator, chats, and workspace.

cta.title: Tools that help coaches manage clients
cta.description: Plans, reports, chats, and follow-up in a practical interface built for coaches.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: A complete view of key metrics, platform activity, and cases that need review.

users.title: User management
users.description: Manage accounts, users, pending cases, and core actions such as add, edit, and approve.

billing.title: Billing and payments
billing.description: Track packages, subscriptions, payments, and client financial records.

plans.title: Plan management
plans.description: Organize workout and nutrition plans and assign them to clients with full content control.

forms.title: Forms and responses
forms.description: Create intake forms, review responses, and check data and attachments before starting service.

reports.title: Reports and follow-up
reports.description: Review client weekly reports and monitor cases that need attention.

content.title: Libraries and content
content.description: Manage the exercise library, recipe library, and internal content used in programs and plans.

operations.title: Operations management
operations.description: Organize daily operations through shared tools, calendar, messaging, and overall workflow tracking.

cta.title: Full control over platform operations
cta.description: From users and billing to content and reports, all admin tools in one place.

steps.title: From signup to follow-up
steps.description: The system covers the full workflow from data collection to plans, reports, and daily follow-up.

intake.title: Collect data
intake.description: Create a custom intake form and share it with the client to collect essential details, goals, and health status.

review.title: Review responses
review.description: Review client answers and attachments and confirm that the information is complete before creating the account.

testimonials.title: Experiences that reflect the system’s value
testimonials.description: The platform helped organize the client journey more clearly, improve cooperation between admins and coaches, and simplify daily follow-up.

items.name: Sarah
items.text: I started tracking my workouts, nutrition plan, and weekly reports from one place, which made staying consistent much easier than using multiple separate tools.

items.name: Ahmed
items.text: The system gave me a practical way to manage clients, plans, reports, and chats, and accessing each client’s details became faster and more organized.
items.achievement: Faster follow-up and better client management

items.name: Noura
items.text: We now have more clarity in user management, form reviews, billing follow-up, and day-to-day operations inside the platform instead of relying on separate tools.

items.name: Khaled
items.text: Having workouts, nutrition, reports, and chats in one system improved how we follow up with clients and made it easier to deliver a more professional service.

faqs.title: Frequently asked questions
faqs.description: Short answers about how the platform works, different roles, plans, reports, and billing.

0.question: What does this system mainly provide?
0.answer: The system provides an integrated platform for managing clients, workout plans, nutrition, weekly reports, chats, forms, and billing in one organized and clear place.

1.question: Is the system suitable for clients, coaches, and admins together?
1.answer: Yes. The system is designed to provide a tailored experience for each role based on permissions, so clients, coaches, and admins each get the right interface and tools.

2.question: How does the system help track progress?
2.answer: The system helps track progress through the client profile, weekly reports, adherence logs, measurements, and progress photos, making faster and more accurate decisions possible.

0.question: How is a new client account created inside the system?
0.answer: The process usually starts with an intake form or client data collection, then responses are reviewed, the account is created, linked to the responsible coach, and plans are assigned before follow-up begins.

1.question: Do permissions differ between admin, coach, and client?
1.answer: Yes. Each role has a different access level. Admins have broader control, coaches manage clients, plans, and follow-up, while clients focus on workouts, nutrition, reports, and communication.

0.question: Can workout and nutrition plans be created and customized easily?
0.answer: Yes. The system allows creating plans or reusing existing ones, then customizing and assigning them to clients while benefiting from the exercise library, recipe library, and available content.

0.question: Does the system support billing, payments, and subscriptions?
0.answer: Yes. The system includes a dedicated page for packages, subscriptions, payments, and financial records, helping admins monitor financial operations in an organized way.

0.question: Can settings and appearance be customized inside the system?
0.answer: Yes. The system provides pages and settings to manage basic data, usage preferences, and some customization elements related to the user or work environment.
